articles.title: Vedanta Aluminium share price gains as brokerages remain bullish; CLSA sees 18% upside
articles.excerpt: CLSA assigned an ‘Outperform’ rating on Vedanta Aluminium Metal shares, with a target price of ₹540 apiece, based on 6x FY28CL EV/Ebitda. The target price implies an upside potential of 18% from Tuesday’s closing price.

articles.title: Knack Packaging IPO: Price band set at  ₹161-170 per share; check key dates, issue details
articles.excerpt: Knack Packaging's IPO ranges from ₹161 to ₹170, open for subscription from July 1-3. The lot size is 88 shares, with a distribution among QIBs, NIIs, and retail investors. Listing on BSE and NSE anticipated on July 8.
